Hero.badge: The Premium Way to Transfer Money Globally
Hero.description: Remitium redefining borders. Transfer money across 180+ countries instantly with zero hidden fees and bank-level security.

Features.step1Desc: Create an account in minutes or log in to start your journey with Remitium.
Features.step2Title: Add Details and Choose a Service
Features.step2Desc: Enter recipient details, select your preferred service like bank transfer, cash pickup, or mobile wallet, and confirm.
Features.step3Desc: Complete your transaction with confidence using one of our secure payment methods.

AppDownloadSection.leftPanelDescription: Send money, manage your wallet, and track transactions on the go. Get the Remitium app today!

SecuritySection.heroDescription: All your transactions are protected with advanced encryption, ensuring your data stays secure and private.
SecuritySection.fraudDetectionDesc: Our intelligent system monitors system for suspicious activity, providing real-time fraud prevention.
SecuritySection.mfaDesc: Safeguard your account with an extra layer of protection through two-factor authentication.
SecuritySection.platformDesc: Convert data noise intelligent insights for competitive differentiation qulaity check equlity.
SecuritySection.paymentDesc: Remitium uses industry-standard payment methods like PayPal, Stripe, and others to keep your transfers safe.
SecuritySection.complianceDesc: Fully compliant with global AML and KYC standards, keeping transactions safe.

ImpactSection.description: Join a community that relies on Remitium for fast, secure, and reliable money transfers.
ImpactSection.globeSubtitle: Every major currency. Every major corridor.
ImpactSection.trust3Sub: Always here when you need us

TestimonialSection.headingPart1: See why people around the world
TestimonialSection.testimonial1Quote: Remitium makes it so easy to send money to my family. Transparent rates, instant transfers — it's the only app I use.
TestimonialSection.testimonial2Quote: I've tried every remittance app out there. Remitium is the only one that's fast, truly transparent, and reliable every single time.
TestimonialSection.testimonial3Quote: Sent money to my sister in Accra in under 2 minutes. Incredible speed and the app interface is so clean to use.
TestimonialSection.testimonial4Quote: The exchange rates are unbeatable. I save so much compared to my bank every single month.
TestimonialSection.testimonial5Quote: Zero hidden fees and instant notifications at every step. Customer support responds in under 5 minutes — genuinely world-class.
TestimonialSection.testimonial6Quote: Setup was simple, my first transfer went through in minutes. The live rate display is a nice touch — I always know exactly what I'm paying.
